results.title: Heat Sinks | Thermal | Electronic Components Distributor DigiKey
results.snippet: Heat sinks are thermal management components designed to dissipate heat from high-power electronic devices and prevent overheating. results.title: Online Catalog - Passive Heat Sink - Alpha Novatech
results.snippet: A heat sink with a dense fin pattern will always outperform a comparable heat sink with a sparser fin pattern at a given airflow. However, a denser fin pattern will generate a significantly higher pressure drop, requiring more powerful fans to generate a given airflow.

results.title: Heat Sink Extrusions | Advanced Thermal Solutions
results.snippet: The ratio of tall, straight fins to their small footprint base improves thermal performance and saves space. The extruded aluminum minimizes thermal resistance, reduces weight and saves cost over alternative (e.g. copper) heat sinks.
